description: Attempt to move silently or hide from enemies
dmPromptExtension:
## Stealth Rules
- Players can attempt to hide or move silently at any time.
- Success depends on their surroundings, noise level, and enemy alertness.
- On success: set `stealthActive: true` in worldPatch.
- On failure or combat: set `stealthActive: false` in worldPatch.
- Stealth breaks if the player attacks or makes loud noise.
